message.content:
@startuml
actor Professor as P1
actor Professor as P2
participant TelaPrincipal as TP
participant StudentController as SC
participant StudentEntity as SE

P1 ..> TP : visualizar a lista de alunos
TP ..> SC : requisitar lista de alunos
SC ..> SE : buscar por alunos
SE ..> TP : listar de alunos
TP ..> P2 : exibir lista de alunos

@enduml
